home.heroSubtitle: Build, automate, and scale your WhatsApp communication.

docs.pagerMicrocopy: Most people read these in order. The sidebar is always there if you want to skip around.

search.hint: Arrow keys to move · Enter to open · Esc to close

chatbot.title: Docs help
chatbot.subtitle: Short answers from this site
chatbot.welcome: Ask about setup, campaigns, or pricing — nothing fancy.

contextHint.campaigns: You're on a campaigns page. Common gotcha: unapproved templates look fine until the actual send.
contextHint.setup: You're in setup territory. Connecting Meta usually takes a few minutes; verification can take longer.
contextHint.chatbots: Chatbot page — triggers are picky. Test with your own number first.
contextHint.api: API / webhooks — if signatures fail, it's almost always the wrong secret or body encoding.
contextHint.pricing: Pricing is indicative here; your invoice is the source of truth.

replies.start: Open **Introduction**, then **Set up WhatsApp API** and **Send first campaign**. Connect your WABA in Settings, sync templates, then use **Campaigns → Create**.
replies.campaign: Go to **Campaigns → Create**, pick an approved template, map variables, choose your audience, then schedule or send. Details: **Send first campaign** and **Campaigns**.
replies.pricing: Workspace plans and conversation rates are summarized on **Pricing** (`/docs/pricing`). Confirm current numbers on notifyy.io/pricing.
replies.default: Try the three shortcuts below, or search the docs (Ctrl+K).

seo.homeDesc: Technical documentation for Notifyy: WhatsApp API setup, campaigns, chatbots, CRM, inbox, analytics, and API reference.
